title: The Neuroscience of Sleep
description: Why you're always tired, how light affects your sleep, and the exact protocol Huberman uses to optimise his sleep — backed by neuroscience.

title: Elon Musk — Full Interview
description: 3 hours with Elon Musk on AI, consciousness, SpaceX, Tesla, the nature of reality, and what he fears most. One of the most revealing conversations ever filmed.

title: The Power of Vulnerability
description: The most-watched TED Talk of all time. Brené Brown explains how vulnerability is not weakness — it's the birthplace of courage, creativity, and connection.

title: Why We Do What We Do
description: Tony Robbins on the invisible forces that drive human behaviour — the 6 needs that explain why people do everything they do.

title: Naval Ravikant on Wealth and Happiness
description: Naval explains how to get rich without getting lucky, the difference between wealth and status, and why reading is the single highest-leverage activity.

title: Your Body Language Shapes Who You Are
description: How posture shapes confidence, hormones, and outcomes — two minutes of 'power posing' measurably changes your body chemistry. One of TED's top talks.

title: Inside the Mind of a Master Procrastinator
description: Tim Urban (Wait But Why) explains the monkey in your brain — the panic monster and the instant gratification monkey. Funniest TED talk ever. Then it gets real.

title: Yuval Noah Harari on AI and the Future
description: Harari (Sapiens author) and Fridman on AI, consciousness, free will, democracy, and whether humans are becoming obsolete.

title: How to Speak So People Want to Listen
description: 7 deadly sins of speaking and 4 powerful techniques to make your voice captivating. One of the most practically useful TED talks for daily life.

title: The Art of Saying No
description: Tim Ferriss on essentialism, protecting your time, and why saying no to almost everything is the only way to do anything great.
